children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: Notwithstanding any contract, the representative of an individual may not receive, for services rendered in connection with the claim of an individual for payment of lump-sum compensation under part B, more than that percentage specified in subsection (b) of a payment made under part B on such claim.
2 percent for the filing of an initial claim for payment of lump-sum compensation; and
10 percent with respect to objections to a recommended decision denying payment of lump-sum compensation.

children.heading: Inapplicability to other services
children.label: c Inapplicability to other services
children.text: This section shall not apply with respect to services rendered that are not in connection with such a claim for payment of lump-sum compensation.

children.heading: Penalty
children.label: d Penalty
children.text: Any such representative who violates this section shall be fined not more than $5,000.
